test_Approval().notice: 授权：setApprovalForAll(operator, approved)查询授权：isApprovedForAll(account, operator)操作者代转账

test_Burn().notice: 销毁单种：burn(from, id, amount)批量销毁：burnBatch(from, ids, amounts)

test_ConstructorAndConstants().notice: 构造方法：new MyERC1155Demo(uri)URI 查询：token.uri(id)        owner 查询：token.owner()常量：GOLD / SILVER / SWORD / SHIELD接口检测：token.supportsInterface(interfaceId)

test_Mint().notice: 铸造单种：mint(to, id, amount, data)铸造 NFT：mintNFT(to, data) → 返回新 id查询余额：balanceOf(account, id)总供应量：totalSupply(id)NFT 检测：isNonFungible(id)

test_MintBatch().notice: 批量铸造：mintBatch(to, ids, amounts, data)批量余额查询：balanceOfBatch(accounts, ids)

test_Transfer().notice: 单种转账：safeTransferFrom(from, to, id, amount, data)批量转账：safeBatchTransferFrom(from, to, ids, amounts, data)
